g.text: 2. Clarify the problem with the interviewer

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - how long are the strings? is there a limit?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - are there any constraints I need to know about?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - is it possible for a number to be passed to the function?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: if so, how might that be handled?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Work out the problem and diagram it on paper or the whiteboard (make sure to verbalize what you are thinking)
